sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Stocks Fall, Oil Jumps On Iran Fears; GE Aerospace, Planet Labs, Cameco In Focus
feed.summary: Stocks experienced a decline while oil prices surged due to fears surrounding Iran. The article highlights market action for the day and focuses on key stocks to watch, including GE Aerospace, Planet Labs, and Cameco. This report features analysis from Alexis Garcia and Ed Carson on Investor's Business Daily.

feed.title: Live Oak Bancshares Declares Cash Dividends for Shareholders
feed.summary: Live Oak Bancshares (LOB) has announced cash dividends for both its common stock and Series A preferred shares, payable on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 5, 2026. The company will issue $0.03 per share for common stock and $0.52344 per depositary share for its preferred stock. These declarations demonstrate the company's confidence in its earnings stability and capital position, aiming to attract income-focused investors.

feed.title: Why Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Shares Are Sliding Today
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) shares dropped 13.6% after the company issued a weak financial forecast for 2026, despite reporting better-than-expected fourth-quarter results. The projected adjusted earnings per share for the full year 2026 missed analyst forecasts, attributed to rising costs which saw the operating margin fall significantly. This weaker outlook overshadowed strong quarterly revenue and adjusted earnings, causing a significant market reaction.

feed.title: Citigroup Raises Quanta Services (PWR) Price Target to $640 | PW
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Quanta Services (PWR) to $640 from $540, maintaining a "Buy" rating, reflecting continued optimism in the company's market performance. This increase follows several other positive analyst evaluations and price target adjustments for PWR in recent months. Despite the positive analyst sentiment, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value fair value calculation.

feed.title: Enphase, Saia, MYR Group, Old Dominion Freight Line, and Shoals Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Enphase, Saia, MYR Group, Old Dominion Freight Line, and Shoals surged in the afternoon session after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down tariffs previously imposed by the Trump administration. This ruling, which found the International Emergency Economic Powers Act of 1977 was not applicable to justify the tariffs, is expected to lower costs for manufacturers by reducing the price of imported materials and equipment. The market reaction indicates that while the news is significant, it's not seen as fundamentally altering the long-term perception of these businesses.

feed.title: First Solar, Viavi Solutions, Orion, Limbach, and Oshkosh Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court struck down Trump-era tariffs, leading to a jump in several stocks, including First Solar, Viavi Solutions, Orion, Limbach, and Oshkosh. This decision is expected to lower costs for manufacturers by reducing the price of imported parts and materials, alleviate budget pressures for firms, and could potentially lead to faster interest rate cuts. The ruling is particularly beneficial for small and medium-sized businesses and has seen some companies like Viavi Solutions reach new 52-week highs.

feed.title: Macy’s Welcomes Retail Veteran Dayna Ziegler as Senior Vice President, General Merchandise Manager – Ready to Wear
feed.summary: Macy's has announced the appointment of Dayna Ziegler as Senior Vice President, General Merchandise Manager for Ready-to-Wear, effective March 2, 2026. Ziegler brings extensive experience from other department stores and specialty retail, including senior buying leadership roles at Saks Global, Saks Fifth Avenue, and Neiman Marcus. In her new role, she will focus on curating customer-centric assortments and strengthening Macy's brand portfolio.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical Issues $600 Million Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Company has issued $600 million of 4.500% unsecured notes due 2031, with expected net proceeds of approximately $593.7 million. The funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including working capital, capital expenditures, and strategic initiatives. Analysts currently rate EMN stock as a Hold with a $75.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, assigns a Neutral rating due to mixed financial outlooks.

feed.title: U.S. Equity ETF Tracker | Macro data combined with tariff rulings drive a nearly 16% surge in the 2x Long Silver ETF; weakness in the 'NVIDIA holdings' concept pushes the 2x Short NBIS ETF and CRWV ETF up over 17%.
feed.summary: Macroeconomic data and recent tariff rulings have led to an almost 16% increase in the 2x Leveraged Silver ETF (AGQ.US). Concurrently, ETFs tracking concepts related to "NVIDIA holdings" experienced significant inverse gains, with the 2x Inverse NBIS ETF (NBIZ.US) and 2x Inverse CRWV ETF (CORD.US) surging over 17%. Meanwhile, major U.S. stock indices closed higher, with technology giants like Google, Netflix, Amazon, Apple, and NVIDIA also seeing gains.

feed.title: Hurricane Boats Honored for Customer Service with NMMA Marine Industry CSI Award
feed.summary: Hurricane Boats has received its ninth National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA) Customer Satisfaction Index (CSI) Award, recognized for exceptional customer satisfaction and industry-leading service. The award was presented at the 2026 Discover Boating Miami International Boat Show. Award recipients achieve 90% or higher in customer satisfaction based on customer feedback from new boat purchases.

feed.title: Why MaxLinear is handing stock awards to its newest employees
feed.summary: MaxLinear, Inc. announced that it has granted equity inducement awards to newly hired employees under its 2024 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. These grants were approved by the Compensation Committee and aim to attract new talent. This news highlights the company's strategy to incentivize new hires with company stock, aligning their interests with the company's performance.

feed.title: NaaS Technology Inc. Received Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Market Value Deficiency
feed.summary: NaaS Technology Inc. announced it has received a notification from Nasdaq regarding non-compliance with the minimum market value of listing securities requirement. The company has 180 days, until August 17, 2026, to regain compliance by maintaining a market value of US$35 million or more for at least ten consecutive business days. NaaS Technology plans to monitor its market value and expects its shares to continue trading on Nasdaq during this grace period, despite also not meeting other listing requirements related to stockholders' equity and net income.

feed.title: Mitek Systems Adopts New Performance-Based Annual Incentive Plan
feed.summary: Mitek Systems (MITK) has adopted a new Annual Incentive Plan on February 20, 2026, to attract, motivate, retain, and reward full-time employees, including executives. Cash bonuses under this plan will be tied to corporate and individual performance goals, focusing on revenue and adjusted EBITDA. This move aims to align employees' incentives with Mitek's overall growth and profitability objectives.

feed.title: NeuroPace to Report Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on March 3, 2026
feed.summary: NeuroPace, Inc. announced it will report its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 after market close on Tuesday, March 3, 2026. A conference call and webcast will follow at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time) for investors to participate and listen to the discussion. The webcast will be archived on the company's investor relations website for replay.

feed.title: iPower slashes costs 28%, sells GPM, starts $2M buyback
feed.summary: iPower (NASDAQ: IPW) reported fiscal Q2 2026 results, showing a 28% year-over-year reduction in operating expenses to $5.6 million and a gross margin of 44.0% despite a revenue decline to $7.1 million due to strategic supply chain restructuring. The company also implemented a Digital Asset Treasury strategy, completed a $2.3 million divestiture of Global Product Marketing Inc. (GPM) post-quarter, and authorized a $2 million share repurchase program, signaling confidence in its financial position.

feed.title: Materion Corporation to Hold Annual Shareholder’s Meeting May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Materion Corporation announced it would hold its annual shareholder's meeting on May 7, 2026, at 8 a.m. MT in Salt Lake City, Utah. The company, a global leader in advanced materials solutions, specializes in various high-performance industries and employs nearly 3,000 people worldwide. Contact information for investor and media inquiries was also provided.

feed.title: Match Group Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Match Group Inc. (MTCH) stock rose 3.71% on Friday, closing at $31.83, even as it underperformed compared to its competitors. The S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also saw gains. This marked the third consecutive day of positive movement for Match Group shares.

feed.title: Austin hotel REIT Summit Hotel Properties plans May 20 annual meeting downtown
feed.summary: Summit Hotel Properties (NYSE: INN) has announced its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will take place on Wednesday, May 20, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time in Austin, Texas. Stockholders of record as of March 6, 2026, are eligible to attend and vote. The company also reiterated details of its portfolio, consisting of 95 assets (52 wholly owned) and 14,348 guestrooms across 24 states as of February 19, 2026.

feed.title: Henry Schein Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Henry Schein Inc. (HSIC) saw its stock advance by 3.61% to $79.57 on Friday, outperforming the broader market indices like the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average. Despite the strong performance, the company's stock closed 3.90% below its 52-week high. The article highlights HSIC's positive trading session in the context of a generally rising market.

feed.title: B2Gold Faces Earnings Struggles Despite Revenue Surge in Q4
feed.summary: B2Gold (BTG) experienced a significant revenue surge to $1.05 billion in Q4, yet its adjusted EPS of $0.11 fell short of the anticipated $0.18, leading to a stock decline of 4.83%. This discrepancy between strong revenue growth and lower-than-expected earnings points to underlying cost issues or operational challenges. The company's financial health shows a mixed picture with good gross margins but low overall profit margins, prompting investors to closely monitor future strategies to improve profitability.

feed.title: BioAge Labs to Present at Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference
feed.summary: BioAge Labs, Inc. announced its participation in the Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on February 25-26, 2026. CEO and co-founder Kristen Fortney, PhD, will join a fireside chat, and both Fortney and CFO Dov Goldstein, MD, will hold one-on-one meetings. The company is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focused on developing therapeutic candidates for metabolic diseases by targeting human aging.

feed.title: Littelfuse stock hits all-time high at 367.5 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Littelfuse Inc. (LFUS) stock has reached an all-time high of $367.50, reflecting a 44% increase over the past year and a 47% return in the last six months. This surge follows outstanding financial results for Q4 2025, where the company surpassed analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Despite an InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is currently overvalued, analysts remain optimistic about the company’s future prospects.

feed.title: New $150M blank-check company hits Nasdaq in search for a deal
feed.summary: Paloma Acquisition Corp I (PALOU) announced the closing of its $150 million Initial Public Offering on February 20, 2026, selling 15 million units at $10.00 each. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-half redeemable public warrant, with whole warrants exercisable at $11.50 per share. The blank-check company, led by Anna Nahajski-Staples, plans to pursue a business combination in the precious metals and M&A sectors.

feed.title: MasTec, Expeditors, and Methode Electronics Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of MasTec, Expeditors, and Methode Electronics surged after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down tariffs imposed by the Trump administration, a decision expected to reduce costs for manufacturers. The ruling, which deemed the use of the International Emergency Economic Powers Act of 1977 inapplicable for tariffs, is anticipated to benefit small and medium-sized businesses and potentially accelerate interest rate cuts due to reduced inflation concerns. This development led to significant stock price jumps for engineering, logistics, and electrical systems companies.

feed.title: SYNOPSYS INC ($SNPS) CEO 2025 Pay Revealed
feed.summary: SYNOPSYS INC's CEO, Sassine Ghazi, is estimated to have received $19.6 million in compensation in 2025, a nearly 40% decrease from 2024. This information comes from a recent SEC filing. The article also details recent insider trading, government contracts, congressional trading, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings related to SNPS.

feed.title: ORCL Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Oracle Corporation Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Oracle made false or misleading statements regarding its AI infrastructure strategy, significant capital expenditure increases, and the resulting risks to its debt, credit rating, and free cash flow. Investors are encouraged to join the lawsuit and may be entitled to compensation.

feed.title: Host Hotels’ Robust Q4 Sends Positive Signals to Investors
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts Inc. (HST) saw its stock rise by 3.41% after announcing a strong Q4 adjusted FFO of $0.51, a special dividend of $0.72 per share, and strategic asset sales. The company's 2026 guidance is promising, with adjusted FFO projected between $2.03 and $2.11, supported by robust profitability and effective asset management. Analyst sentiment is positive, with Stifel reiterating a bullish stance and increasing the price target to $22.

feed.title: Beaten-down software stocks RingCentral and Five9 rally as earnings quell some AI concerns
feed.summary: RingCentral and Five9, leading customer service software providers, experienced significant stock rallies after reporting strong fourth-quarter results, easing investor concerns that AI advancements would negatively impact their business models. Both companies indicated that AI has become a "tailwind," boosting bookings and revenue, with RingCentral's AI-related annual recurring revenue doubling year-over-year and Five9's enterprise AI bookings more than doubling. This positive news comes after a recent massive sell-off in the software sector, driven by fears that new AI tools from firms like Anthropic and OpenAI could displace traditional software-as-a-service models.

feed.title: Klarna Market Turbulence: Shares Plunge Amidst Significant Losses
feed.summary: Klarna Group plc shares have plummeted by 5.27% following a significant overhaul of its payment services and the reporting of a substantial net loss of $0.79 per diluted share for 2025. The company's stock experienced a 25% drop after transitioning to a net loss, indicating potential instability and severe investor concern. Challenged by legal actions, fiscal missteps, and sub-par performance compared to peers, KLAR faces a negative outlook unless strategic pivots occur.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics raises quarterly dividend by 6% to $0.53/share
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics has announced a 6% increase in its quarterly cash dividend, raising it from $0.50 per share to $0.53 per share. This new dividend will be payable on or before April 12, 2024, to shareholders of record as of March 29, 2024. The move reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders.

feed.title: Live Oak Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ:LOB) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.03
feed.summary: Live Oak Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ:LOB) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share, payable on March 15th to shareholders of record on March 5th. This translates to an annualized dividend of $0.12 and a yield of approximately 0.3%. The company's dividend appears sustainable, with a payout ratio of 3.6% and expected future earnings projected to cover it.

feed.title: HARTFORD INSURANCE GROUP, INC. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Hartford Insurance Group, Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing strong financial performance with total revenues of $28,368 million and a net income of $3,836 million, both up significantly from 2024

feed.title: GLOBAL PAYMENTS INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. has released its annual Form 10-K report, detailing its financial performance, business operations, and strategic initiatives. The report highlights the company's efforts to enhance sustainable performance through acquisitions, business transformations, and technological innovations, including the acquisition of Worldpay Holdco, LLC and divestiture of its Issuer Solutions business. The company also reported key financial metrics and outlined various challenges and risks, such as cybersecurity threats, integration risks, and market competition.

feed.title: Kinsale Capital Group, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Kinsale Capital Group, Inc. (KNSL) has released its annual 10-K report, showcasing strong financial performance with an 18.0% increase in total revenues and a 21.4% rise in net income. The company, which specializes in the excess and surplus (E&S) insurance market, attributes its success to its underwriting expertise, proprietary technology, and efficient claims management. Kinsale is focused on continued growth, capital efficiency, and returning value to shareholders despite potential challenges from market competition, regulatory risks, and climate change.

feed.title: PBF Energy to Participate in Industry Conferences
feed.summary: PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF) announced its management team will attend three industry conferences in late February and early March 2026: the Scotiabank Global Energy Conference, the Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference, and the Wolfe Research Refining Conference. Presentation materials will be accessible on the investor relations section of the company's website. PBF Energy is a major independent North American refiner and a 50% partner in the St. Bernard Renewables joint venture.

feed.title: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. has released its annual 10-K report, detailing a decrease in total revenues and a net loss for the year, primarily due to lower rooms and food and beverage revenue and increased impairment losses compared to 2024. The company is focusing on enhancing its core portfolio of premium-branded hotels through divestitures of non-core assets and significant renovations, while also preparing for potential benefits from major events in 2026. Despite facing challenges like economic disruptions and increased labor costs, the company maintains a strong balance sheet and is cautiously optimistic about its future outlook.

feed.title: Helix Energy takes investor pitch on the road, from Houston to Vegas
feed.summary: Helix Energy Solutions Group (HLX) announced its participation in four upcoming investor conferences spanning February and March 2026, including events in Houston, Orlando, and Las Vegas, as well as a virtual investor access day. The international offshore energy services company will make its investor presentations available on its website. Helix specializes in well intervention, robotics, and decommissioning, crucial services supporting the global energy transition.

feed.title: Helix to Participate in Upcoming Events
feed.summary: Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. (NYSE: HLX) announced its participation in several upcoming events in February and March 2026, including the Daniel Energy Partners THRIVE Energy Conference, Raymond James & Associates 47th Annual Institutional Investor Conference, Piper Sandler 26th Annual Energy Conference, and the NYSE Energy & Utilities Virtual Investor Access Day. Investor presentations from these events will be available on Helix's website. The company specializes in offshore energy services, focusing on well intervention, robotics, and decommissioning.

feed.title: KFORCE INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Kforce Inc. has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing a decrease in total revenue to $1,329.0 million, down 5.4% from 2024, attributed to macroeconomic uncertainties and technology disruptions like generative AI. Despite these challenges, the company is optimistic, emphasizing strategic investments in AI, offshore expansion to India, and continued shareholder returns through buybacks and dividends. Kforce also highlighted its focus on aligning costs with revenue and navigating a competitive industry and economic fluctuations.

feed.title: Orange County Bancorp, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Orange County Bancorp (Nasdaq: OBT) announced a cash dividend of $0.18 per share of common stock. This dividend will be paid on March 16, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of March 4, 2026. The distribution represents a near-term cash return for shareholders.

feed.title: CDW Corp SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: CDW Corporation has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing a 6.8% increase in net sales to $22,424.1 million, driven by improved customer spending. The company reported a slight decrease in Net Income to $1,066.6 million, impacted by higher interest expenses and taxes. CDW is strategically realigning its customer-facing organization into three new segments—Commercial, Government, and Education—effective January 1, 2026, to better meet market demands and enhance customer engagement, while also managing capital through share repurchases and dividends.

feed.title: First Horizon Corporation to Participate in the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference
feed.summary: First Horizon Corporation announced that CFO Hope Dmuchowski and Chief Credit Officer Thomas Hung will participate in the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2026. A live webcast and audio replay will be available on the company's Investor Relations website. First Horizon Corporation, with $83.9 billion in assets, is a regional financial services company offering various banking services.

feed.title: ABBOTT LABORATORIES SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing robust financial performance with net sales of $44.3 billion and significant growth in medical devices and established pharmaceutical products segments. The report highlights strategic initiatives such as key

feed.title: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. (PFSI) has released its 2025 10-K report, showcasing significant financial growth with total net revenues of over $2 billion and net income of $501.1 million, a 60.9% increase from the previous year. The report details strong performance in both its production and servicing segments, strategic initiatives aimed at optimizing capital structure and extending debt maturities, and a commitment to community involvement. However, the company also acknowledges challenges, including interest rate fluctuations, housing affordability concerns, substantial indebtedness, and operational, cybersecurity, and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Feb. 20: Steel Dynamics announces Q1 2026 cash dividend increase of 6%
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. has announced a 6% increase in its first-quarter cash dividend to $0.53 per common share, payable on or about April 10, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 31, 2026. Chairman and CEO Mark D. Millett stated that this reflects confidence in the company's continuous cash generation, growth initiatives, strong capital structure, and commitment to maintaining an investment-grade credit rating.

feed.title: Why GATX (GATX) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: GATX (NYSE:GATX) stock rose after the company announced strong fourth-quarter 2025 financial results, beating analyst expectations. Additionally, GATX increased its quarterly dividend and authorized a new $300 million share repurchase program, signaling confidence in the company's future. The company also initiated its 2026 earnings guidance and maintained a robust 99.0% North American rail fleet utilization.

feed.title: Entergy adds Barclays forward purchaser to ATM program; $1.658B capacity remains
feed.summary: Entergy has added Barclays Bank PLC as a forward purchaser to its existing at-the-market equity program, with approximately $1.658 billion of common stock capacity remaining. The company plans to issue about $4.4 billion in equity through 2029, with a portion already contracted under forward sale agreements. This move is detailed in a recent SEC filing.

feed.title: Nuveen Real Asset Income and Growth Fund Declares Distribution
feed.summary: The Nuveen Real Asset Income and Growth Fund (NYSE: JRI) has declared its regular monthly distribution with a record date of March 2, 2026, payable on April 1, 2026. The fund will pay $0.1335 per share, and there is an estimation that a portion of this distribution may be from a return of capital. The Board of Trustees has also approved the terms for a transferable rights offering for shareholders as of February 6, 2026, which will expire on March 9, 2026.

feed.title: PLUG CLASS ACTION: Plug Power Investors with Significant Losses Should Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Their Losses
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit on behalf of investors who purchased Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) securities between January 17, 2025, and November 13, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Plug Power misled investors regarding its ability to secure and utilize a $1.66 billion loan guarantee from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) and the planned construction of hydrogen production facilities. Stockholders with significant losses are encouraged to contact Robbins LLP for information on recovering their losses, with a lead plaintiff deadline of April 3, 2026.

feed.title: Canaccord Genuity Group Lowers iRhythm Technologies (NASDAQ:IRTC) Price Target to $198.00
feed.summary: Canaccord Genuity Group has lowered its price target for iRhythm Technologies (NASDAQ:IRTC) to $198.00 from $212.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This adjustment comes despite iRhythm Technologies beating Q4 earnings expectations with revenues of $208.9 million and EPS of $0.29, attributing growth to improved adjusted EBITDA and its first quarter of positive GAAP net income. However, the stock saw a 5.1% decline, trading below its 50- and 200-day averages, alongside a high debt-to-equity ratio and recent insider sales, contributing to near-term valuation and sentiment challenges.
